name: get_spot_price
description: Get the current spot price for a cryptocurrency trading pair such as BTC-USD or ETH-EUR. Useful for checking real-time market prices before placing orders.

parameters.name: currency_pair
parameters.description: The trading pair in format BASE-QUOTE (e.g., BTC-USD, ETH-EUR).

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Optional date for historical price in YYYY-MM-DD format.
